item.description:
A Replit user just launched “Vibe Genomics: Sequencing your Whole Genome at Home”
https://t.co/aOhCs1F6Hs
Useful if you’re inspired by Patrick’s AI genomics experiment but don’t want to share your DNA with a company. https://t.co/ngpJGNt7cP

item.title: 一年多前花 769 元买的 2TB 固态硬盘，今天要 2359 元了…这涨价幅度也太夸张了，整整三倍。 https://t.co/iYC5eA3fbe
